title: Fix TP/SL — compute server-side per trade in /api/trades
objective: Compute tp_price and sl_price server-side from each trade's entry_px and return them in /api/trades. Frontend constant removal is handled in DASH_008.
inputs: Each trade row has: entry_px (float), side ('BUY_YES' or 'BUY_NO')
TP target is fixed at 0.85. SL is 20% adverse move from entry.
deliverables: In _fetch_trades(), for each bot/model_bridge trade dict, add tp_price and sl_price keys:
Do NOT add tp_price/sl_price to manual trades (source='manual')
acceptance_criteria: /api/trades JSON includes tp_price and sl_price on each non-manual trade
Manual trades do not have these fields (or they are null)
verification: curl http://localhost:5000/api/trades | python -m json.tool | findstr tp_price
